_meta.description: Canonical identity and tagging decisions for wiki pages that are not straightforward standalone operational projects.

act-studio.recommended_action: Keep as a named hub page. Treat as the studio cluster, not as a normal funded project.

black-cockatoo-valley.recommended_action: Normalise legacy ACT-BCV references to ACT-BV over time. Keep wiki page and public name as Black Cockatoo Valley.

green-harvest-witta.recommended_action: Keep the wiki page, but treat this as a Harvest node rather than a separate cross-system project code.

grantscope.recommended_action: Keep GrantScope as a wiki page because the codebase name matters, but tag/sync it as CivicGraph.

picc-centre-precinct.recommended_action: Keep as a distinct wiki page and operational stream under PICC.

picc-annual-report.recommended_action: Treat as a deliverable under PICC unless it later receives a dedicated budget line and code.

picc-elders-hull-river.recommended_action: Use the existing ACT-ER sub-project code.

picc-photo-kiosk.recommended_action: Keep as a wiki page and tag to ACT-PI until/unless a dedicated kiosk code is introduced.

smart-connect.recommended_action: Treat SMART Connect as the umbrella code and roll SMART variants into it.

smart-hcp-gp-uplift.recommended_action: Keep page-level distinction, but use the SMART umbrella code for cross-system tagging.

smart-recovery-gp-kits.recommended_action: Keep page-level distinction, but use the SMART umbrella code for cross-system tagging.

caring-for-those-who-care.recommended_action: Backfill the wiki page with ACT-CA and use it directly across systems.

tomnet.recommended_action: Backfill the wiki page with ACT-TN and use it directly across systems.

deadlylabs.recommended_action: Keep as a proof/precedent page. Do not create an ACT project code unless the partnership becomes operationally load-bearing.

place-based-policy-lab.recommended_action: Keep as a conceptual/method page unless it gets a funded operational line of its own.

quandamooka-justice-strategy.recommended_action: Keep as a place-specific strategy page. Use ACT-JH until it becomes a separately budgeted operational project.

staying.recommended_action: Keep as a methodology page. Do not assign a separate operational code.

three-circles.recommended_action: Keep as the canonical flagship program page. Tag to JusticeHub until it becomes a funded standalone program entity.

minderoo-pitch-package.recommended_action: Operational package only. Never tag as a standalone project.

the-full-idea.recommended_action: Working-draft artefact only. Never tag as a standalone project.

the-brave-ones.recommended_action: Keep as a studio/JusticeHub work series. Promote to its own code only if it gains an independent budget or production stream.

the-caravan.recommended_action: Treat as a work/prototype under Community Capital until a cleaner Community Capital code split is done.

the-vagina.recommended_action: Keep as a placeholder wiki page, not a coded operational project, until the work becomes real enough to budget and publish.

ACT-CG.recommended_action: Keep this row for historical R&D and engine references, but treat ACT-CS / CivicGraph as the canonical project everywhere new.

ACT-HQ.recommended_action: Keep this row for historical overhead and operations tagging, but roll new cross-system references toward ACT-CORE / ACT Regenerative Studio.

ACT-PC.recommended_action: Keep this row for historical PICC Centre bookkeeping, but roll new cross-system references toward ACT-PI / PICC unless a dedicated centre code is reintroduced.
